title: Vague under-specified lead — ask followup
description: A minimal, messy lead with almost no structured information. Should trigger ASK_FOLLOWUP with critical questions about destination, origin, and party size.

inputs.raw_note: Someone called, wants to go international. Big family, maybe around March. Said budget is fine, will call back.

assertions.message: Under-specified lead should require followup questions
Even in ASK_FOLLOWUP mode, traveler bundle must not leak internal concepts
Budget raw text should be extracted even from vague input
